issue_summary: Add Payload support to FileDictionary (Suggest) and make it more configurable
javadoc_before:
/** * Creates a dictionary based on an inputstream. *

* NOTE: content is treated as UTF-8 */
javadoc_after:
/** * Creates a dictionary based on an inputstream. * Using {@link #DEFAULT_FIELD_DELIMITER} as the * field seperator in a line. *

* NOTE: content is treated as UTF-8 */
